data.title: Explore: Is .skogai/templates/ self-explanatory?
data.description:
Read all files in .skogai/templates/ and evaluate.

Report:

* What templates exist and what are they for?
* Is each template clear enough to use without additional context?
* Does templates/SKOGAI.md exist and does it explain the templates system?
* Are there references to templates from other .skogai files (like knowledge/SKOGAI.md)?
* Is anything missing or unclear for a new agent picking this up?

This is an explore-only task. Report findings, do not make changes.
